description:
A select input in various styles.

By default, the label will be presented vertically above the select field.
If the *labelClassName* property is included, the label will be presented
horizontally to the left of the select field, and the label will receive
the CSS classes in that property.  This can be used to set the width of
the label area for multiple fields, no matter how long the label itself is.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra CSS class(es) for the trigger button

props.name: description
props.description: Optional description (help text) displayed below the label, wired to aria-describedby

props.name: descriptionClassName
props.description: Optional CSS for any rendered description [text-base-content/60 text-sm]

props.name: errors
props.description: Optional errors component to display below select field

props.name: errorsClassName
props.description: Optional CSS for any rendered errors [bg-error text-error-content]

props.name: entryClassName
props.description: CSS class(es) to add to rendered options and sections

props.name: fieldsetClassName
props.description: Optional CSS for the outer fieldset wrapper

props.name: handleBlur
props.description: Optional handler for blur events

props.name: handleChange
props.description: Handler for value change events

props.name: isInvalid
props.description: Is the current value invalid?

props.name: label
props.description: Visual label for this select field

props.name: labelClassName
props.description: CSS class(es) to add if horizontal presentation is requested.  This should set the width of the label area to match multiple input fields.

props.name: listBoxClassName
props.description: CSS class(es) to add to the rendered ListBox

props.name: name
props.description: Select field name (also used as id)

props.name: options
props.description: Available options for this Select component

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Optional placeholder text when no value is selected

props.name: optionClassName
props.description: CSS class(es) to add to rendered options

props.name: popoverClassName
props.description: CSS class(es) to add to the popover wrapper

props.name: sectionClassName
props.description: CSS class(es) to add to rendered sections

props.name: sectionHeadingClassName
props.description: CSS class(es) to add to rendered section headings

props.name: value
props.description: Current selected value (empty string means no selection / show placeholder)
